3246770.name: NightDirge
3246770.description:
There's something disturbing happening in the land of Halleumask, an outbreak of malicious vines are spreading across forests, oceans, and in the home town of the vexatious Dirge, Bloodrite City. The creeping vines should have known it will be the last place they visit.

Take control of the mostly brooding canine Dirge and guide their friends, the inn maid Anna and the vampire Fang through the now apocalyptic world which has been overrun by new species of sentient vines, moss and more. As you run through the world try to attain the highest score you can before reaching the end of your journey, you may unlock a few things for your next run through should you decide to return to this nightmarish world...

NightDirge features a few short levels with more content to see on additional run throughs, there's also new surprises each time you complete the game up until a certain point. As NightDirge receives updates the screenshots and trailer on this store page may change, in-game content and visuals may also change over time.

NightDirge is powered by the RPG Maker VX Ace engine, the music that plays in the game is from the RPG Maker VX Ace engine. The music in the trailer was composed by Irene Chan.

Vine jumpscare.
